{{Enemy Infobox|Phantasmal Gardener|2}}
'''Phantasmal Gardener''' is an {{2|Elites|Elite}} {{2|Monsters|Enemy}} found in the {{2|Underdocks}}. Four appear together in the encounter.

== Pattern ==
{{Intents|Phantasmal Gardener|2}}
All four Gardeners cycle through the same four moves in order: {{Int|Phantasmal Gardener|Bite||2}}, {{Int|Phantasmal Gardener|Lash||2}}, {{Int|Phantasmal Gardener|Flail||2}}, {{Int|Phantasmal Gardener|Enlarge||2}}, repeating. Each one starts at a different point in the cycle, so they always use different moves from each other.

== Notes ==

== Version History ==
* '''Early Access v0.100.0 (BETA)'''
** Nerfed '''Phantasmal Gardeners''': HP decreased from 28(29)-32(33) -> 26(27)-31(32)
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Phantasmal Gardener to the game.
